title: sisymbrium pyrenaicum subsp. contortum
intro: Sisymbrium pyrenaicum subsp. contortum, also known as the Pyrenean rocket, is a rare and endangered subspecies of the Sisymbrium pyrenaicum plant, a type of flowering plant in the mustard family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sisymbrium pyrenaicum subsp. contortum are believed to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
